summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlatanSad website with 315 products imported. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend functionality mostly operational with some UI interaction issues

ui_bugs.issue: Some category pages show 0 products despite backend having data
Product links not easily identifiable in catalog modal

integration_issues.issue: Category filter may not be displaying all available products

issues: Hero slider navigation arrows not easily detectable by automated testing

passed_tests: ✅ Admin dashboard accessible and displays correct stats
✅ Homepage loads with hero slider and navigation
✅ Admin stats API shows 315 products, 11 categories, 0 orders
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fixes needed: 1) Investigate why some categories show 0 products in frontend despite having data in backend, 2) Improve product card clickability in catalog modal, 3) Add clearer data-testid attributes for better automated testing support
